first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions identify the same core strengths (long experience, relevant current role, strong testing culture) and the same weaknesses (missing Nest.js, Kotlin, and specific testing tools). The minor differences in wording and the specific examples chosen to highlight strengths are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reveal any reliance on the redacted name.
